user.title: Porkbun API Credentials
user.description: Enter your Porkbun API key and secret key. You can create these at porkbun.com/account/api.

data_description.api_key: Your Porkbun API key from porkbun.com/account/api.
data_description.ignore_verification: If enabled, continue setup even when API credential verification fails. You can update keys later from Reconfigure.

domain.title: Domain Configuration
domain.description: Configure the domain and optional subdomains for DDNS updates. The root domain is always included.

data_description.domain: The root domain to update (e.g., example.com).
data_description.subdomains: Comma-separated list of subdomains (e.g., www, vpn). The root domain is always included.
data_description.ipv4: Create or update A records with your public IPv4 address.
data_description.ipv6: Create or update AAAA records with your public IPv6 address.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Porkbun
reauth_confirm.description: Your API credentials are no longer valid. Please enter new credentials.

data_description.api_key: Your Porkbun API key from porkbun.com/account/api.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure Porkbun DDNS
reconfigure.description: Update the API credentials and domain for this integration. Subdomain selection and per-record toggles live under Configure (options).

data_description.api_key: Your Porkbun API key from porkbun.com/account/api.
data_description.secret_key: Your Porkbun secret API key paired with the API key above.
data_description.domain: The root domain to update (e.g., example.com).

error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach the Porkbun API. Please check your network connection.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid API key or secret key. Please check your credentials.
error.domain_not_found: Domain not accessible with these API keys. Ensure API access is enabled for this domain in your Porkbun dashboard.

data_description.update_interval: How often to check and update DNS records, in seconds. Minimum 60.
data_description.startup_delay: How long to wait after Home Assistant starts or the config entry reloads before the first update, in seconds. Set to 0 to disable.
data_description.subdomains: Comma-separated list of subdomains (e.g., www, vpn). The root domain is always included.
data_description.ipv4: Create or update A records with your public IPv4 address.
data_description.ipv6: Create or update AAAA records with your public IPv6 address.
data_description.failure_threshold: Number of consecutive failed update cycles before raising an error. Transient failures below this count are silently tolerated. Default 3.

confirm.title: Fix Porkbun API access for {domain}
confirm.description:
Porkbun returned an API error for **{domain}**. This usually means the domain's API access is disabled in the Porkbun dashboard, or the API key/secret is wrong.

Submit to open the Reconfigure flow where you can re-enter your API credentials and confirm the domain.

auth_failed.message: Authentication failed. Please check your Porkbun API credentials.
